sourceOfTruth: Runtime-ready means a built llama.cpp fork graph route selects the shipped Metal kernel and a numeric smoke test passes. Symbol presence in default.metallib is not enough.

turbo3.requiredSmoke: A built-fork GGML graph op or fused attention op dispatches kernel_turbo3_dot(_multi) and numerically matches the fixture/reference.
turbo3.blocker: No dedicated Metal GGML graph route exists for TBQ3 K-cache scoring. The standalone shader contract is pre-rotated-Q dot packed-K, which does not match a generic MUL_MAT/GET_ROWS path.

turbo4.requiredSmoke: A built-fork GGML graph op or fused attention op dispatches kernel_turbo4_dot(_multi) and numerically matches the fixture/reference.
turbo4.blocker: No dedicated Metal GGML graph route exists for TBQ4 K-cache scoring. The standalone shader contract is pre-rotated-Q dot packed-K, which does not match a generic MUL_MAT/GET_ROWS path.

turbo3_tcq.requiredSmoke: A built-fork GGML graph op or fused attention op dispatches kernel_turbo3_tcq_dot(_multi) with the TCQ codebook bound and numerically matches the fixture/reference.
turbo3_tcq.blocker: No dedicated Metal GGML graph route exists for TCQ K-cache scoring. The codebook binding makes a generic route especially unsafe.

qjl.notes: dispatch_smoke links against the built fork's libggml-metal.dylib and drives GGML_OP_ATTN_SCORE_QJL through kernel_attn_score_qjl1_256_multi.

polar.requiredSmoke: A built-fork GGML graph route dispatches PolarQuant for both use_qjl=0 and use_qjl=1 and numerically matches the fixture/reference.
polar.blocker: No Metal graph route exists for Q4_POLAR. A constrained matvec bridge is possible, but production attention still needs a dedicated route or a fused attention path that avoids decode-to-scratch fallback.
